The concept of "sunk cost" does not suggest that it is wise to pay for what would be discarded.
It just says that it could be wise to discard what you have paid for.
There is a difference between them.


If you fail to spot the subtle difference, it just means that you should do some exercises on tenses.

如果你知再等都冇車，聽朝先有車，你仲會唔會因為等左10分鐘仲繼續等？
要考慮既係你之後有幾多時間可以付出等車，唔係之前等左十分鐘

但之前等左十分鐘令佢可以update 下一分鐘有巴士埋站既機會率, 咁既情況下仲係咪sunk cost

所以佢咪加左“聽朝先有車”
你考慮既始終都係“要等多幾分鐘先有車”
唔係“等左幾多分鐘”
咁講 有好多唔同既因素可以影響你“要等多幾分鐘先有車”
“等左幾多分鐘”只係其中之一

The concept of "sunk cost" does not suggest that it is wise to pay for what would be discarded.
It just says that it could be wise to discard what you have paid for.
There is a difference between them.


If you fail to spot the subtle difference, it just means that you should do some exercises on tenses.
